Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel (1) Defendant'S Response To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents; & (2) Defendant'S Verifcation Of Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Aug-15-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Patrick Connolly of the law offices of Utrecht & Lenvin LLP (415-357-0600) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Roger D. Yuen of the law offices of Hartsuyker Stratmen & Williams-Abrego (510-457-3478) appears as counsel for defendant/opposing party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY AUGUST 15 2017, LINE 5, PLAINTIFF ANDRE GONZALES' Motion To Compel (1) Defendant'S Response To Plaintiff'S Request For Production Of Documents; & (2) Defendant'S Verifcation Of Discovery Responses is Granted in part and Denied in part. Defendant's only response to the motion is a declaration of Defendant's counsel filed on August 11, 2017 that attaches a supplemental response to the RFP served January 18 and documents described as responsive to the RFP, the requested verifications, as well as responses to other discovery requests that are not implicated in this motion. The motion to compel is denied as moot. However, Defendant has not shown substantial justification for failing to produce the documents or provide the verifications earlier. Sanctions in the amount of $2500 are awarded against defendant, payable to plaintiff's counsel not later than August 30, 2017. See Rule of Court 3.1348(a). Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not reported. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
